channel.title: Autoscaling on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Autoscaling on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: k8s: See your serverless: introducing the Headlamp plugin for Knative
item.description:
Headlamp now has a Knative plugin that adds integrated views and actions for Knative resources in the Kubernetes UI. It centralizes KService management, traffic splitting, autoscaling configuration, metrics, and related CRDs, with release 0.3.0-beta available.

  • Source: Kubernetes Official Blog

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure HorizonDB
item.description:
Azure HorizonDB is in public preview as a PostgreSQL-compatible database service. The preview highlights autoscaling storage up to 128 TB and claimed performance improvements over self-managed PostgreSQL.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Capacity Autoscaling
item.description:
Capacity Autoscaling for Elastic SAN is now generally available. It lets customers set a policy to automatically expand SAN capacity based on usage instead of overprovisioning or managing capacity manually.

  • Source: Azure Updates
